pi_items.source: Setup script uses 'ecommerce_dashboard' directory and creates shopping-related components
Setup script introduces bugs exactly aligning with these topics (e.g. stale closures in setInterval, race condition for fetch, unmounted cleanup)
verifier.py calculates 16 pts per file and 20 for VLM. Passes if files_modified >= 3, vlm_passed, and score >= 60.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a completely synthetic React e-commerce dashboard containing 5 specific React hooks anti-patterns. Verified that the setup script dynamically creates files demonstrating memory leaks, fetch race conditions, stale closures, reference equality infinite loops, and direct state mutations. Verified the verifier.py logic explicitly requires fixing at least 3 files and successfully passing a VLM IDE usage check to meet the 60 point pass threshold. All SOC, occupation, and industry metadata correctly correspond to standard classifications.
